title: Japanese Millet Crumble
description: A sweet and satisfying dessert, combining the delicate flavors of Japan with the crunch of a crumble topping.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together millet and Japanese ingredients.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine buttery and crumble ingredients.
Top the millet mixture with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with additional crumble if desired.
